desc: DONE: built a reproducible Alpine 3.24.0 aarch64 RAM-root from official minirootfs SHA 4b8cd66a6688b2a87276c39843ed89c3a06d9534fc6a5823c586aff2696c1f2a. Output initramfs SHA fc473c67672cd1596fac133759ed1b3ba18c716f42a400e3cfab9d4ad59cbb9b reproduced twice; 516 entries, 4,041,821 bytes compressed. Native arm64-container chroot verified release/arch, init syntax, and mount/watchdog/setsid applets. Init mounts only proc/sysfs/devtmpfs/tmpfs, provides a respawning ttydc0 Alpine shell, and performs no block discovery/mount/write. No rig work occurred. Result: done/2026-07-23-t6040-alpine-ramroot-artifact.md; live preflight: done/2026-07-23-t6040-alpine-ramroot-preflight.md.
author: codex
